description.en: Attacks an enemy and increases own <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1</color> turns.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>1</color>ターンの間、自身の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>をUPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并在<color=#28d9ed>1</color>回合内提高自身<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>이 증가합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPする。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

name.jp: アイ・オブ・タイフーン

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-10%</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-10%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAfter the caster takes their turn, has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to Counterattack, until the caster's next turn.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n자신이 턴을 획득한 이후, 다음 턴 동안 <color=#28d9ed>60%</color>의 확률로 반격합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分がターンを獲得した後、次のターンの間<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>の確率で反撃する。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n自身获得回合后,下一回合有<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>的几率发动反击。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> chance to grant an <color=#28d9ed>extra turn</color> at the end of the turn.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n턴 종료 시 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>추가 턴</color>을 획득합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nターン終了時<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>追加ターン</color>を獲得する。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n回合结束时,有<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>的几率获得<color=#28d9ed>额外回合</color>。
